title: Patch<T> missing Clone and PartialEq derives
description: Patch<T> derives only Debug and Default. As a utility value type used in every patch struct, it should also derive Clone (where T: Clone) and PartialEq (where T: PartialEq). Without PartialEq, tests cannot use assert_eq! on Patch fields. Without Clone, callers cannot duplicate a patch value for use in two places. Fix: add #[derive(Clone, PartialEq)] to the Patch<T> enum — derive handles the T: Clone and T: PartialEq bounds automatically.
